name: Hair and Beard Nourishment
description: A nourishing balm that hydrates and tames longer beard bristles, providing a light hold for shaping fuller beards.
howToUse: Warm between fingers before massaging into the beard while dry to nourish, repair, and tame longer bristles.
ingredients: Cocoa Butter, Babassu Oil, Jojoba Oil, Beeswax, Parfum.
